SolderMaskExpNeedPcb: Open a PCB document before running this command.
SolderMaskExpSelectPad: Select at least one pad first (component selection is also supported and will expand to its pads).
SolderMaskExpInputBefore:
Enter mask expansion (single-side offset from pad outline).
Canvas unit: ${1}
SolderMaskExpInputAfter:
Values are converted to PCB internal units; solid fills are placed on matching solder mask layers.
Recommended: <= ${1} mil.
SolderMaskExpTooLarge: Value is too large. Please enter <= ${1} mil.
SolderMaskExpModeInputBefore:
Select execution mode:

Enter 1: Preview only (no primitives created)
Enter 2: Create solder mask fills
